site.name: OmniOpener
site.tagline: Open any file, right in your browser.
site.description: 200+ browser-based file tools. No uploads, no installs. Everything runs client-side.

tools.title: Draw.io Viewer
tools.h1: Open & View .drawio Files Online
tools.meta_description: View and explore Draw.io diagrams directly in your browser. No software needed — drag, drop, and view your .drawio files instantly.

tools.title: Markdown to PDF
tools.h1: Convert Markdown to PDF Online
tools.meta_description: Convert Markdown files to beautifully formatted PDFs in your browser. Free, private, no upload required.
